refund.title: Cancellation/Return/Exchange Policy
refund.subtitle: Information about cancellation, return, and exchange policies.

delivery.title: Shipping Information
delivery.item1: Orders are shipped within 1-3 business days. (Excluding weekends and holidays)
delivery.item2: Additional shipping fees may apply for remote areas.
delivery.item3_prefix: You can track your delivery in

cancel.title: Order Cancellation
cancel.before_item1: Orders can be cancelled before the product is prepared for shipping.
cancel.before_item2_prefix: You can cancel directly in My Page >
cancel.after_item1_suffix: and will be processed as a return.

return.title: Return Information
return.period_desc: Returns can be requested within 7 days of receiving the product.
return.reject_item1: Products damaged due to customer negligence
return.reject_item2: Products that have been opened and used
return.reject_item3: Products that cannot be resold due to time elapsed
return.fee_note: * Free shipping for defective products or wrong deliveries

exchange.title: Exchange Information
exchange.period_desc: Exchanges can be requested within 7 days of receiving the product.
exchange.process_step1: Request exchange via customer service or My Page
exchange.process_step2: Ship the product to the return address
exchange.process_step3: Exchange product will be shipped after inspection
exchange.fee_note: * Free shipping for defective products or wrong deliveries

guide.title: Contact Information
guide.description: If you have any questions while using our service, please feel free to contact us.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Please check the FAQ before contacting us.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1_suffix: button at the top right of the homepage.
faq.q3: How do I write a post?

about.title: About Gnuboard7
about.welcome_description1: Gnuboard7 is an open-source CMS platform built on Laravel and React.
about.welcome_description2: With modules, plugins, and a template system, you can freely extend functionality without modifying the core. From small websites to large-scale services, build fast and flexible with Gnuboard7.
about.why_description1: Traditional CMS platforms require core modifications to add features. Every update breaks customizations, creating a vicious cycle of maintenance headaches.
about.why_description2: Gnuboard7 was designed to solve this problem. With hooks and modular architecture, you can add features while keeping the core intact.
about.opensource_description1: Gnuboard7 is completely open-source. You can freely use, modify, and distribute the source code, including for commercial projects.
about.opensource_description2: Bug reports, feature suggestions, and code contributions are all welcome. Check out the development progress on GitHub and join our community.
